productDisplayName: Nike Men As Race Day Ss Blue T-Shirts
description: CompositionDark blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% recycled polyester with a 100% polyester mesh, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short sleeves with nike swoosh in silver print on left chest and light blue piping along the side mesh panels from the sleeves to the hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow fabric to lie on itself when wetCool iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanDesigned for that absolute running experience, this nike t-shirt is replete with Dri-Fit comfort to make your sporting experience all the more comfortable and fun. The Dri-Fit technology wicks away sweat, allowing you to concentrate on your running, while the strategically placed mesh panels enhance ventilation and regulate body temperature. Team this with performance shorts and running shoes for that complete running comfort.
